broken_squire.name: the Broken Squire
broken_squire.flavor: A squire whose knight never came home from the Climb. He's been looking for one to follow ever since.

weir_warden.name: a Weir Warden
weir_warden.flavor: She kept the dykes at Brackmere when the gates were sealed. She knows the smell of forgetting and refuses it.

ash_kin.name: Ash-Kin
ash_kin.flavor: A penitent who turned back at the Climb and remembered. She mends faster than she dies.
